member.name: T:Salem.PInvoke.User32
member.summary: Provides P/Invoke signatures for functions in the Windows User32 library (user32.dll).

member.name: F:Salem.PInvoke.User32.AssemblyName
member.summary: Specifies the name of the Windows User32 dynamic-link library (DLL).
member.remarks: This constant is typically used when invoking native methods from user32.dll via platform invocation (P/Invoke).

member.name: M:Salem.PInvoke.User32.HideCaret(System.IntPtr)
member.summary:
Removes the caret from the screen. Hiding a caret does not destroy its current shape or invalidate the insertion point.
Click here for the full documentation.
member.param: A handle to the window that owns the caret. If this parameter is NULL, HideCaret searches the current task for the window that owns the caret.
member.returns:
true if the function succeeded, otherwise, false.
To get extended error information, call GetLastError.
member.remarks:
HideCaret hides the caret only if the specified window owns the caret. If the specified window does not own the caret, HideCaret does nothing and returns FALSE.
Hiding is cumulative. If your application calls HideCaret five times in a row, it must also call ShowCaret five times before the caret is displayed.
For an example, see Hiding a Caret.
